inputs.text: Bachha ko kafi dino se bukhar hai, bahut thakaan mehsoos ho raha hai, sir dard bhi hai

inputs.text: Bachha ko roz bukhar badh raha hai, pet dard bhi ho raha hai, kabz bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Abhi tak koi specific lakshan nahi hai

inputs.text: Bachha ko tez bukhar hai, kabz ke baad dast ho raha hai, bahut kamzori mehsoos ho rahi hai, pet dard bhi bahut hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Tez bukhar, kabz ke baad dast, aur pet dard typhoid ke cardinal lakshan hain

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Pet dard aur dast gastroenteritis meh bhi ho sakte hain, lekin tej bukhar nahi hota

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria meh aam taur par chhillatein hoti hain, jo abhi tak nahi hui

inputs.text: Bachha ko abhi bhi tej bukhar hai, bahut thakaan mehsoos ho rahi hai, pet dard bhi badh gaya hai, dast bhi ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
